definition.body: count={{ count }} ratio={{ ratio }} sum={{ count + ratio }}.
definition.name: metrics

description: An integer vs a FRACTIONAL float — distinctions representable in all three languages. (1.0-vs-1 is excluded: JavaScript has a single IEEE-754 number type, so 1.0 is indistinguishable from 1 — see spec Edge Cases.) Tests that an integer stays integer-rendered and a fractional float stays float-rendered, identically across bindings.
